narrative:
Tri-County North Lsd (Preble) school district has 3,890 registered voters, with 54.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.3 percentage points.
